original_image_tags: Scanned back or cover sheet of a vintage document. The page is mostly blank with visible bleed-through text from the reverse side. At the bottom left is a circular time-punch clock stamp with a 12-hour dial and the date "SEP 2 7 1949". To the right of this is faint, illegible handwriting and a faded blue ink date stamp reading "SEP 23 - 2 31 PM '46". There are three dark circular holes punched along the top edge of the paper.

A circular mechanical time clock stamp. The outer ring is marked with numbers 1 through 12. An inner triangle contains a smaller arrow pointer. The date "SEP 2 7 1949" is printed in a straight line beneath the circle.

elements.description: One circular clock-style stamp with an arrow pointing between 8 and 9, text 'SEP 27 1949' below it. One linear blue ink timestamp reading 'SEP 23 2:31 PM' near the bottom right. Two hole-punch marks at the top.
